name: autofix
description: CI autofix agent: diagnoses a single CI failure from KIRO_DIAGNOSTICS_FILE and applies a minimal, verified, root-cause fix.

agentSpawn.command: bash -c 'rm -f "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-modified-files.txt" "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-sensors-ran.txt" "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-stop-blocks.txt" 2>/dev/null; echo "Autofix session initialized — stale verification state cleared."'

preToolUse.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(^|[;&|]\s*|\bsh\s+-c\s+|\bbash\s+-c\s+)git\s+(-[a-zA-Z]\s+)*(commit|push|checkout|reset|rebase|merge|stash|branch\s+-[dD]|clean|tag\s+-d)"; then echo "BLOCKED: git operation not allowed — the workflow handles git." >&2; exit 2; fi'

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */baileys-service/*.ts|*/baileys-service/*.tsx) cd baileys-service && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */android/*.kt) cd android && ./gradlew spotlessApply -PspotlessFiles="$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; echo "$FILE" >> "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-modified-files.txt"'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */baileys-service/*.ts|*/baileys-service/*.tsx) cd baileys-service && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */android/*.kt) cd android && ./gradlew spotlessApply -PspotlessFiles="$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; echo "$FILE" >> "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-modified-files.txt"'

bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "cargo (clippy|test|fmt)|npm (run build|test)|npx eslint|gradlew build"; then touch "${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-sensors-ran.txt"; fi'

stop.command: bash -c 'SENSOR_FLAG="${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-sensors-ran.txt"; MODIFIED="${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-modified-files.txt"; BLOCKS="${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/autofix-stop-blocks.txt"; COUNT=$(cat "$BLOCKS" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ]; then rm -f "$SENSOR_FLAG" "$MODIFIED" "$BLOCKS" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi; if [ -s "$MODIFIED" ] && [ ! -f "$SENSOR_FLAG" ]; then echo $((COUNT + 1)) > "$BLOCKS"; echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"You modified files but did not run verification sensors. Run the appropriate sensors (cargo clippy, cargo test, npm run build, etc.) for your modified files before stopping.\"}"; else rm -f "$SENSOR_FLAG" "$MODIFIED" "$BLOCKS" 2>/dev/null; fi'
